categories.description: Multi-shot reminder to tenant members that a Season's registration is about to open. Fires T-24h + T-1h before registration_opens_at. Audience filtered to eligible members (when the Season has sport_key set, only members whose profile matches — Wave 3 audience filter; Wave 3a fires to every tenant member). Skipped for members who already enrolled to a matching Season in the same tuple.

Multi-shot reminder that a Season's registration is about to close. Fires T-48h + T-24h + T-2h before registration_closes_at. Audience: tenant members who have NOT yet enrolled to this Season (Wave 3 subscription filter — Wave 3a assumes all-member fanout with a client-side dismiss). Skipped when late_registration_ends_at exists (the T-2h notification is redundant with the late-window UX).

Fires T-48h before Season.start_date. Audience: enrolled athletes + coaches referencing this Season (Wave 3 enrollment filter — Wave 3a fanout to every tenant member with a client-side dismiss). Includes reminder of first-session date + venue.

Fires on SeasonCompleted. Audience: enrolled athletes referencing this Season. Season-summary notification — includes final enrollment count, standout stats (Wave 3 stats module integration), and thank-you copy. Opt-in because it's non-actionable (past events).

Sent to tenant owner + admin when the is_current flag flips on a Season within a scope tuple. Cannot opt out — year-over-year reporting queries pivot on the current season; admins MUST know when the reporting frame shifts. Includes the outgoing + incoming Season names + the scope tuple.

Sent to enrolled athletes + coaches when a Season with status IN (in_progress, playoffs) has its start_date or end_date changed. Cannot opt out — the shift affects their bookings + coach schedules. Includes the before + after date range + a link to reschedule any affected sessions.
